events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario involves isolated metal parts in equipment bonding on a residential electrical job, work in progress. NEC 250.104 requires bonding of metal piping and structural steel; 250.30 covers separately derived systems. Isolated metal parts that should be bonded are a non-compliant and potentially hazardous condition — could become energized and lack fault path. Fail.
